name.title: Bridge Name
name.description: Display name for this platform instance in Homebridge.

discovery.title: Enable mDNS Discovery
discovery.description: Discover Shelly devices via mDNS on the same L2 segment. Disable when devices live on a different subnet and you supply manual entries below.

devices.title: Manual Devices
devices.description: Devices to configure explicitly. Useful when mDNS does not reach them, when they require credentials, or when you want to force a generation.

host.title: Host or IP
host.description: Hostname or IP, optionally with a port. URLs and userinfo are rejected.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the accessory. Overrides the device's own name.

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for devices with authentication enabled.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for devices with authentication enabled.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.description: Use https when credentials are configured. Required when the device challenges with Basic auth (Basic is refused over cleartext HTTP).

generation.title: Generation
generation.description: Force a generation if auto-detection picks the wrong one.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: Background polling interval. Polling acts as a safety net even when realtime push is on.

requestTimeout.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
requestTimeout.description: Per-request HTTP timeout. Increase on slow networks or for devices under high CPU load.

realtime.title: Gen2 WebSocket Realtime
realtime.description: Subscribe to ws://<host>/rpc (or wss:// when protocol is https) for instant NotifyStatus updates. Polling continues as a safety net.

coiot.title: Gen1 CoIoT Push
coiot.description: Listen for Gen1 CoIoT (CoAP) notifications on UDP 5683 and refresh devices immediately when they push. Multicast and unicast both supported. Requires Homebridge on the same L2 segment unless devices are configured to unicast directly to the Homebridge host.

include.title: Include Filter
include.description: Optional substrings matched against host, MAC, device id/name, and component key. When set, only matching items are exposed.

exclude.title: Exclude Filter
exclude.description: Optional substrings matched against host, MAC, device id/name, and component key. Matching items are hidden.

splitChannels.title: Split Channels Into Accessories
splitChannels.description: Register one HomeKit accessory per channel/component instead of grouping them under a single device accessory. Useful for multi-relay devices when you want each relay to appear independently in Home.

removeStaleAccessories.title: Remove Stale Accessories
removeStaleAccessories.description: Unregister cached accessories that do not reappear during discovery. Combine carefully with discovery on flaky networks — a transient mDNS miss will remove real devices.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Emit verbose debug logs. Reserved for future use; errors already route through Homebridge's debug channel.
